this build stacks over +100% attack speed; the sim now caps attacks/sec at the stated 3.0 (Cursed Ring tooltip), so sustained-DPS is no longer uncapped — the exact cap interaction still merits a practice-mode check
the sim opens on Viper, which the field rarely builds (0.2% pick) — a sim-only call; compare the meta cores below

coachLine: Sim-optimal for sustained DPS: first spike lands around minute 12 (Viper), third item by minute 24. Take Demiurge: +26.9% on this kit’s main output at minute 15.

all.name: Marrow
all.note: Marrow (Major): missing-health-dependent omnivamp; no sustain-uptime model yet

all.name: Nihil
all.note: Nihil (Major): accrual rate depends on combat uptime (how long Doom persists per fight), which the closed-form sim cannot observe

all.name: Aion
all.note: Aion (Major): economy effect; valuable but outside combat objectives (revisit with gold curves)

all.name: Exarch
all.note: Exarch (Major): buffs the HEAL TARGET (usually an ally) — team-side value outside the single-hero sim; self-heal uptime depends on heal cadence vs the 4s window

metaBuilds.title: Crit Burst
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 25 — about 735 damage in one combo in the sim.

metaBuilds.title: Crit Burst
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 25 — about 786 damage in one combo in the sim.

metaBuilds.title: Crit DPS Carry
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for sustained auto DPS, online around minute 25 — about 316 auto-attack DPS in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +23% more sustained auto DPS: try Viper over Terminus (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Sparrow ramps on auto-attacks — pressure their positioning before they itemize, and armor blunts them later.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Viper: their 3s all-in loses 36% of its bite, at the cost of 39% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Legion deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Viper: their 3s all-in loses 29% of its bite, at the cost of 39% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Ikra deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Crystalline Cuirass instead of Viper: their 3s all-in loses 30% of its bite, at the cost of 39% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Murdock deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Aegis Of Agawar instead of Viper: their 3s all-in loses 19% of its bite, at the cost of 23% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Drongo deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Aegis Of Agawar instead of Viper: their 3s all-in loses 19% of its bite, at the cost of 23% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Skylar ramps on auto-attacks — pressure their positioning before they itemize, and mixed resist blunts them later.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Aegis Of Agawar instead of Viper: their 3s all-in loses 20% of its bite, at the cost of 23% of this kit's damage.

laneSteer.provenance: “Hellfire Blast” ⇒ tank; the sim can’t model this augment — steered by the declared playstyle + field evidence — field carry 47.9% over 4,041 games, magnitude not simulated.
